'''rovazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabalic|cabalic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabalic|cabalic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rovazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovazithi|rovazithi]] || [[word:rovaziji|rovaziji]] || [[word:rovazishi|rovazishi]] || [[word:rovaziki|rovaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovazuthuthu|rovazuthuthu]] || [[word:rovazujuju|rovazujuju]] || [[word:rovazushushu|rovazushushu]] || [[word:rovazukuku|rovazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovazuthu|rovazuthu]] || [[word:rovazuju|rovazuju]] || [[word:rovazushu|rovazushu]] || [[word:rovazuku|rovazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovazufthuf|rovazufthuf]] || [[word:rovazufjuf|rovazufjuf]] || [[word:rovazufshuf|rovazufshuf]] || [[word:rovazufkuf|rovazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovazethe|rovazethe]] || [[word:rovazeje|rovazeje]] || [[word:rovazeshe|rovazeshe]] || [[word:rovazeke|rovazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovazothotho|rovazothotho]] || [[word:rovazojojo|rovazojojo]] || [[word:rovazoshosho|rovazoshosho]] || [[word:rovazokoko|rovazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovazotho|rovazotho]] || [[word:rovazojo|rovazojo]] || [[word:rovazosho|rovazosho]] || [[word:rovazoko|rovazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovazofthof|rovazofthof]] || [[word:rovazofjof|rovazofjof]] || [[word:rovazofshof|rovazofshof]] || [[word:rovazofkof|rovazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfthÃŸf|rovazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfjÃŸf|rovazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfshÃŸf|rovazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfkÃŸf|rovazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rovazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rovazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rovazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rovazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfthÃŸf|rovazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfjÃŸf|rovazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfshÃŸf|rovazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfkÃŸf|rovazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfthÃŸf|rovazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfjÃŸf|rovazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfshÃŸf|rovazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rovazÃŸfkÃŸf|rovazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovazÃḊthÃḊ|rovazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rovazÃḊjÃḊ|rovazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rovazÃḊshÃḊ|rovazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rovazÃḊkÃḊ|rovazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovazathatha|rovazathatha]] || [[word:rovazajaja|rovazajaja]] || [[word:rovazashasha|rovazashasha]] || [[word:rovazakaka|rovazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovazatha|rovazatha]] || [[word:rovazaja|rovazaja]] || [[word:rovazasha|rovazasha]] || [[word:rovazaka|rovazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovazafthaf|rovazafthaf]] || [[word:rovazafjaf|rovazafjaf]] || [[word:rovazafshaf|rovazafshaf]] || [[word:rovazafkaf|rovazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rovazasha|rovazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovazshÃḋsha|rovazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovazrosha|rovazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovazmusha|rovazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovazyasha|rovazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovaznkshÃḋsha|gorovaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovaznkrosha|gorovaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovaznkmusha|gorovaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovaznkyasha|gorovaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rovavazasha|rovavazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovavazshÃḋsha|rovavazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovavazrosha|rovavazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovavazmusha|rovavazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovavazyasha|rovavazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovavaznkshÃḋsha|gorovavaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovavaznkrosha|gorovavaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovavaznkmusha|gorovavaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovavaznkyasha|gorovavaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:revÃḊzasha|revÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:revÃḊzshÃḋsha|revÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:revÃḊzrosha|revÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:revÃḊzmusha|revÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:revÃḊzyasha|revÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorevÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gorevÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorevÃḊznkrosha|gorevÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorevÃḊznkmusha|gorevÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorevÃḊznkyasha|gorevÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rovfazasha|rovfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovfazshÃḋsha|rovfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovfazrosha|rovfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovfazmusha|rovfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovfazyasha|rovfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovfaznkshÃḋsha|gorovfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovfaznkrosha|gorovfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovfaznkmusha|gorovfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovfaznkyasha|gorovfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
